queries.question: What year did the author who wrote the most recently published story start employment?
queries.sql:
SELECT R.Start_Year
FROM Reporters AS R
JOIN Stories AS S ON R.ID = S.AssignedToReporterID
WHERE S.PublishDate = (
    SELECT MAX(PublishDate)
    FROM Stories
);
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?start_year WHERE {
  ?r a :Reporters .
  ?s a :Stories .
  ?s p:hasReporters ?r .
  ?r p:Start_Year ?start_year .
  ?s p:PublishDate ?publishdate_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:PublishDate ?m0 } }
  FILTER(STR(?publishdate_x) = STR(?m))
}

queries.question: What month and year did the author who wrote the most recently published story start employment?
queries.sql:

FROM Reporters AS R
JOIN Stories AS S ON R.ID = S.AssignedToReporterID
WHERE S.PublishDate = (
    SELECT MAX(PublishDate)
    FROM Stories
);
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

queries.question: In which month did the autor who wrote "Climate Change: A Global Crisis" start their employment?
queries.sql:
SELECT R.Start_Month
FROM Reporters AS R
JOIN Articles AS A ON R.ID = A.AuthorID
WHERE A.Title = 'Climate Change: A Global Crisis';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?start_month WHERE {
  ?r a :Reporters .
  ?a a :Articles .
  ?a p:hasReporters ?r .
  ?r p:Start_Month ?start_month .
  ?a p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Climate Change: A Global Crisis")
}
